chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 1736 of 2018 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of Misc. No.7481/2018 2. For hearing of main case 17.03.2025 Mr. Ghulam Haider Shaikh, advocate for the petitioner Mr. Muhammad Rashid Arfi, advocate for respondents No.2 & 3 along with Mr. Nayyar Shafiq, Collector Appraisement Port Muhammad Bin Qasim Mr. Kashif Nazir, Assistant Attorney General Mr. Nayyar Shafiq, Collector Appraisement Port Muhammad Bin Qasim is present his presence and assistance is appreciated. Per learned counsel for the petitioner grievance has been resolved, therefore, petition may be disposed of. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
